transcription.text: If you're looking for flight deals to Europe it doesn't get any better than this. So TAP Portugal is offering $349 round-trip tickets to Europe and Morocco for reservations made between November 26 and December 2nd for travel made between January 31st and May 15th, 2026. So let me know in the comments if you're booking a trip to Europe and follow for more travel deals.
